hero.title: Measure precisely for your sector. Detect every loss. Decide with confidence.
hero.subtitle: SectorCalc helps businesses calculate costs, measure efficiency, detect losses, and optimize operations — without expensive ERP systems.
hero.trustStrip: 27 sectors · Free calculators · Premium reports · Measurement logic · No ERP required

valueProps.title: Four loss dimensions — one platform
valueProps.subtitle: SectorCalc surfaces money, material, time and energy leaks with free checks and premium expert verdicts.
valueProps.financialDesc: Margin, cost and profit leaks before you commit to a quote or contract.
valueProps.materialDesc: Scrap, waste and yield gaps that standard calculators ignore.
valueProps.timeDesc: Setup, delay, rest windows and OEE-style efficiency exposure.
valueProps.energyDesc: kWh, carbon and compliance buffers including CBAM-style cost risk.

sectors.title: Choose from {count} active sectors
sectors.subtitle: Nine industry categories — from CNC and construction to agriculture, energy and daily life tools. Free checks surface risk; premium analyzers deliver expert verdicts.

pricing.title: Choose how you protect your margin.
pricing.tagline: Premium verdict analyzers turn free risk signals into minimum safe prices and export-ready reports.
pricing.roiCopy: One avoided bad quote can pay for a full year of Pro.
pricing.freeDescription: Daily free margin checks with visible risk signals — no verdict or PDF export.
pricing.freeFeatures: Free sector calculators|Visible risk warnings|Industry hub pages|No minimum safe price
pricing.singleDescription: One premium analyzer run with full verdict output — ideal for a single high-stakes decision.
pricing.singleFeatures: One premium analyzer verdict|Minimum safe price where applicable|Margin leak breakdown|PDF-ready report for that run
pricing.proDescription: Unlimited premium analyzers across all sectors with saved reports and PDF export.
pricing.proFeatures: All premium analyzers|Saved verdict reports|PDF export|Cancel anytime
pricing.proAnnualDescription: Full Pro access billed annually — best value for teams quoting weekly.
pricing.proAnnualFeatures: All premium analyzers|Saved verdict reports|PDF export|Priority onboarding when available
pricing.teamDescription: Multi-seat access for estimators, ops leads and field managers.
pricing.teamFeatures: Shared sector analyzer access|Team report history|Admin seat controls (planned)|Volume pricing review

checkout.proActive: SectorCalc Pro is active on your account.

purchaseSuccess.proUpsellTitle: Want unlimited access to every tool?
purchaseSuccess.proUpsellBody: 27 sectors, unlimited premium analyzers and saved reports — Pro from $19/month.

footer.tagline: Sector-specific calculators, measurement tools and decision reports.
footer.trustNote: No ERP required. Business data is not sold.

pain.title: Detect the hidden losses in your industry
pain.subtitle: Every sector has unique losses — scrap, time, energy, material. See them instantly with sector-specific calculation tools.

material.title: Material cost risk
material.text: Setup time, rework and hidden labor erode margin after the estimate looks fine.

labor.title: Labor & time risk
labor.text: Free checks expose visible risk — premium analyzers deliver the full verdict.

overhead.title: Overhead & scope risk
overhead.text: No ERP rollout, no consulting retainer — built for shops, trades and service teams.

freeCheck.title: Run a free sector check
freeCheck.subtitle: {count} sector quick checks with 3–5 inputs. See visible risk in your browser — no account, no safe price, no final verdict.
freeCheck.cardBody: Visible setup and labor exposure — full safe price withheld on free tier.

premiumStep.title: Unlock the full verdict
premiumStep.subtitle: Premium analyzers add minimum safe price, margin leak drivers, suggested action and PDF export — the decision layer operators need before quoting.
premiumStep.cardBody: Margin leak breakdown, accept / reprice verdict and exportable PDF report.

sample.title: CNC Quote Risk Report
sample.subtitle: This is what a premium decision output looks like — not a spreadsheet dump.
sample.actionValue: Reprice or reduce scope before sending the quote.

compare.title: Quick check vs full verdict
compare.freeItem1: Visible risk signal in your browser
compare.proItem3: Accept / Reprice / Do Not Accept verdict

erp.title: No ERP required
erp.text: Free checks run without enterprise setup or onboarding.

freeSetup.title: Free checks run without setup
freeSetup.text: {count} sector quick checks in your browser — no account needed.

premiumVerdicts.title: Premium verdicts explain the risk
premiumVerdicts.text: Minimum safe price, margin leaks and suggested action before you quote.

stripe.title: Checkout secured by Stripe

privacy.title: Business data is not sold
privacy.text: See privacy policy for data handling details.

industriesPreview.title: Sector packs for operational and commercial decisions
industriesPreview.subtitle: Each industry module combines a quick estimate layer and a premium decision tool — aligned to how that sector prices work, measures margin and evaluates risk.

cta.title: Start calculating for your sector
cta.subtitle: Begin with free tools, upgrade to premium reports when you need them.
